---
title: 'About'
date: '2014-03-13T03:35:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'Texas Cows and Crafts'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '8741308012503800818'
blogger_filename: '/p/about-us.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Texas Cows and Crafts/feed.atom'
---

<h4 style="border-bottom: medium none; border-left: medium none; border-right: medium none; border-top: medium none; text-align: left;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/trade-mark-2-76f606c9275d.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: right; cssfloat: right; float: right; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/trade-mark-2-7890df81811b.jpg" height="171" width="320" /></a>About TC&amp;C</h4>
<div style="border-bottom: medium none; border-left: medium none; border-right: medium none; border-top: medium none;">
<br /></div>
<div style="border-bottom: medium none; border-left: medium none; border-right: medium none; border-top: medium none;">
I am a wife of a great man and mother of two happy boys, Connor and Preston. Creators of messes, fun times and distractions. I have always enjoyed creating new things and learning how to work with new materials. And I have a craft room full of things to prove it. <span style="background-color: magenta;">****insert pic of room here ***** </span>When I decided that I wanted to start this crafting business I was not sure what to call it. We went through a number of names and my husband <a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/">Darrell</a> (<a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/">darrellwolfe.com</a>) came up with Texas Cows and Crafts. I think this came about for 2 reasons: 1. My husband really truly enjoys the cheeseburger, and 2. There are a lot of cows here in Texas. I do go to the ocaasional Farmers Market or crafts show, when time allows. This website is where I will post pictures of things I've made or worked on, posts of things I have learned and updates. &nbsp;And every month I will try to post new items for sale on <a href="http://www.etsy.com/shop/TexasCowsAndCrafts" target="_blank">Etsy</a>, &nbsp;and if you see a picture of an item you want on my website that is not for sale in my <a href="http://www.etsy.com/shop/TexasCowsAndCrafts" target="_blank">Etsy</a> store please contact me and I can see if it is still available, or if can make one for you.</div>
<br />
<h4>
Subscribe By Email</h4>
To get updates when I post a new article or item, subscribe by email here:<br />
<br />
<!-- Begin MailChimp Signup Form -->
<link href="//cdn-images.mailchimp.com/embedcode/slim-081711.css" rel="stylesheet" type="text/css"></link>
<style type="text/css">
 #mc_embed_signup{background:#fff; clear:left; font:14px Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;  width:225px;}
 /* Add your own MailChimp form style overrides in your site stylesheet or in this style block.
    We recommend moving this block and the preceding CSS link to the HEAD of your HTML file. */
</style>
<br />
<div id="mc_embed_signup">
<form action="http://texascowsandcrafts.us3.list-manage2.com/subscribe/post?u=e901edd7b9186d7a9bfdb2ce0&amp;id=c52c5972df" class="validate" id="mc-embedded-subscribe-form" method="post" name="mc-embedded-subscribe-form" novalidate="" target="_blank">
<label for="mce-EMAIL">Subscribe By Email</label>
 <input class="email" id="mce-EMAIL" name="EMAIL" placeholder="email address" required="" type="email" value="" />
    <!-- real people should not fill this in and expect good things - do not remove this or risk form bot signups-->
    <br />
<div style="left: -5000px; position: absolute;">
<input name="b_e901edd7b9186d7a9bfdb2ce0_c52c5972df" type="text" value="" /></div>
<div class="clear">
<input class="button" id="mc-embedded-subscribe" name="subscribe" type="submit" value="Subscribe" /></div>
</form>
</div>
<br />
<br />
Thank you for visiting Texas Cows and Crafts!<br />
<br />
Please contact me with any questions or special&nbsp;requests: <a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/p/about-us.html">Click here.</a><br />
<br />
By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/u/3/101167437852518119732/posts" target="_blank">FlaviaWolfe</a><br />
<br />
<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/">http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com</a>
<br />
<br />
<a href="http://www.etsy.com/shop/TexasCowsAndCrafts" target="_blank">Connect and Shop on &nbsp;our Etsy Store</a><br />
<br />
<a href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Texas-Cows-Crafts/298135563538323" target="_blank">Connect on Facebook</a><br />
<br />
<a href="https://plus.google.com/b/118156879240088112738/118156879240088112738/posts" target="_blank">Connect on Google+</a><br />
<br />
<iframe allowtransparency="true" frameborder="0" scrolling="no" src="//www.facebook.com/plugins/likebox.php?href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fpages%2FTexas-Cows-and-Crafts%2F298135563538323&amp;width=292&amp;height=62&amp;colorscheme=light&amp;show_faces=false&amp;border_color&amp;stream=false&amp;header=true" style="border: none; height: 100px; overflow: hidden; width: 250px;"></iframe><br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
